title: ochna oxyphylla
intro: Ochna oxyphylla, also known as the Mickey Mouse plant, is a small, flowering plant native to southern Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe and protect the skin. The plant's leaves and roots are said to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to address various health concerns and promote overall well-being.
